description: For a new property under contract, an agent needs to use a transaction checklist to ensure all tasks and deadlines are met.

nodes.task_description: Apply a standard 'Buyer Side' transaction checklist template to the new transaction.

expected_outcome.value: Agent successfully creates a new checklist for the property.

nodes.task_description: Enter the key dates from the contract (e.g., effective date, contingency deadlines, closing date) into the checklist.

expected_outcome.value: Agent accurately populates the checklist with all critical deadlines.

nodes.task_description: As tasks are completed (e.g., 'Earnest Money Deposited'), mark them as done in the system.

expected_outcome.value: Agent keeps the checklist updated in real-time throughout the transaction.
